title: viola × oreliensis
intro: Viola × oreliensis, also known as the hybrid sweet violet, is a plant species that is a cross between Viola odorata and Viola reichenbachiana. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Viola × oreliensis include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
